Welcome to Module 4. In this module we're going to be talking about the 6-figure Funnel Formula Customer Captivation Offer. This is the first offer that prospects are presented with when they enter your funnel. We're going to start off by talking about the elements of the Customer Captivation Offer, constructing your own Customer Captivation Offer, how you present prospects with your Customer Captivation Offer, and then we're going to finish by building your Customer Captivation Page. I'm going to show you a couple of resources that you can use to do this.
